title: trichilia trachyantha
intro: Trichilia trachyantha, also known as the African pear, is a plant species belonging to the Meliaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Trichilia trachyantha can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
